examples.summary: uses public role geometry, elevation, and inspect-only constraints to demonstrate concentric corner curves and rounded connector bends; it is not an Apple product, an endorsed implementation, or a built-in Agentic Mermaid Style.
uses public role styles, XYChart category bindings, semantic slots, and inspect-only constraints; it is not a Vercel product, an endorsed implementation, or a built-in Agentic Mermaid Style.

examples.alt: Documentation-only Cloudflare Workers-inspired public StyleSpec prototype
examples.summary: uses public role styles, Gantt section bindings, visible non-color cues, semantic slots, and inspect-only constraints; it is not a Cloudflare product, an endorsed implementation, or a built-in Agentic Mermaid Style.
stresses thick connectors, rounded bends, compact station labels, and group labels.
uses palette, solid fills, typography, corners, and section bands without a custom renderer.
tests dark-page tokens, grid backdrop, pale strokes, and serif labels.
